race.comment: KIND WISH (6) has been in the placings at her last two appearances, finishing second over 1500m at Kilcoy most recently. Key runner who should feature in the finish. KIDS INTHE KITCHEN (8) accounted for a maiden field over 1680m at Ipswich last start, finishing one length ahead of the nearest rival. Re-unites with Brandon Lerena who was on board last start and shapes as one to consider. DOWNEY (1) scored two back at Toowoomba but was below his best last time when sixth over 1200m at Sunshine Coast. Likely improver with top-three prospects on best figures. MADALSA (4) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
